violations.text: The establishment does not have an on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH Center for food Protection at time of inspection. Provided Food Safety Manager application to PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2025

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of bio-film. Per interview with PIC ice machine vents are cleaned daily and ice bin (where ice is held) is cleaned monthly in house. -Reach-in refrig. observed with dust buildup in vent. Ice machine and reach-in refrig. vent to be cleaned at an increase frequency. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025

Observed old rodent droppings in the corner of back storage area. PIC cleaned area at time of inspection. Establishment shall maintain cleanliness of all areas. Establishment to contact pest control to do a full assessment. PIC to email pest report to inspector. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2025

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of bio-film. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was turned off and ice was voluntarily disposed of. Ice machine to be cleaned at an increase frequency. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2023

Various foods were observed held at 43-44 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food was relocated at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2023

The corner lowboy unit was observed with an ambient temperature of 44 degrees. Unit was taken out of service and all food was relocated to colder refrigeration at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2023
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2023
